title: Aptech is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Aptech is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
